summary: Iteration 7 testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: PDF generation with DejaVuSans font (Cyrillic support, styles without parent), POST /api/admin/accrue-profits with correct logic for auto_reinvest, AdminTemplates page at /admin/templates with navigation to create/edit, AdminTemplateForm at /admin/templates/create with auto-translate button, Dashboard wallet section with deposit/withdraw dialogs showing bank requisites and broker selection.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint working
Backend: Admin login with session_token
Backend: GET /api/admin/contract-templates - returns templates list
Backend: POST /api/admin/contract-templates - creates new template
Backend: GET /api/admin/contract-templates/{id}/preview - generates PDF with DejaVuSans font
Backend: POST /api/admin/accrue-profits - processes 21 investments correctly
Backend: Profit accrual logic - auto_reinvest=true -> type='reinvested', profit to current_balance
Backend: Profit accrual logic - auto_reinvest=false -> type='to_available_balance', profit to balance_available
Backend: GET /api/investments/{id}/contract - PDF with DejaVuSans font embedded
Backend: GET /api/brokers - returns brokers list for withdrawal dialog
Backend: GET /api/company-bank-info - returns bank info for deposit dialog
Backend: GET /api/deposit-requests - returns deposit requests
Backend: GET /api/withdrawal-requests - returns withdrawal requests
Frontend: AdminTemplates page loads at /admin/templates
Frontend: Templates list shows 2 templates with stats cards
Frontend: 'Создать шаблон' button navigates to /admin/templates/create
Frontend: AdminTemplateForm page loads at /admin/templates/create
Frontend: 'Автоперевод на KZ/EN' button present in template form
Frontend: Contract text tabs: Русский*, Қазақша, English
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with wallet section
Frontend: Deposit button opens dialog with bank requisites (Банк: Народный банк Казахстана)
Frontend: Withdraw button opens dialog with broker selection and account number field
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test template during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified working: 1) PDF generation uses DejaVuSans font with styles created without parent=styles['...'] to ensure Cyrillic support. 2) POST /api/admin/accrue-profits correctly handles profit accrual - auto_reinvest=true adds profit to current_balance (type='reinvested'), auto_reinvest=false adds profit to balance_available (type='to_available_balance'). 3) AdminTemplates at /admin/templates shows templates list with navigation to create/edit. 4) AdminTemplateForm at /admin/templates/create is a separate page with auto-translate button. 5) Dashboard wallet section has deposit dialog showing bank requisites and withdraw dialog with broker selection and account number field.

details: DejaVuSans and DejaVuSans-Bold fonts embedded in PDF
Styles created without parent=styles['...'] to avoid font override
Both contract PDF and template preview PDF use DejaVuSans
Verified by checking PDF content for font references
auto_reinvest=true: profit added to current_balance, type='reinvested'
auto_reinvest=false: profit added to balance_available, type='to_available_balance'
Returns detailed breakdown with investment_id, user_id, profit, type

components: Templates list with stats cards (Всего шаблонов, По умолчанию, Активные)
Each template shows name, ID, created date, content preview
Action buttons: Star (default), Eye (preview), Edit, Delete
Basic info section: name, description, is_default toggle
Contract text section with language tabs (Русский*, Қазақша, English)
Available variables section with copy functionality
Available balance card with Пополнить/Вывести buttons
Deposit dialog shows bank requisites (Банк, Получатель)
Withdraw dialog has broker selection dropdown
Withdraw dialog has account number input field
Both dialogs have currency selection and amount input
